items.title: Notre Dame is in an interesting position with new CFP recommendations
items.summary: Essentially, hump day is just running scissors out of the T-formation. Huddle up… THE NEW COLLEGE FOOTBALL PLAYOFF? It feels like we are still in the create-a-player mode when it comes to the college football playoff. Every year there’s a tweak, or suggestion, or move — or something. In my own opinion, we should all […]

items.title: Clemson is replacing USC on Notre Dame’s schedule and rivalry roster
items.summary: Perhaps the worst part of this new age of college football is the death to rivalries across the country. The tragedies began with conference realignment 15 years ago, and the big move by Nebraska to the Big 10, and it continues because of what the college football playoff has become. Notre Dame isn’t completely innocent […]

items.title: The 5 most interesting games on the Notre Dame Football schedule
items.summary: We are less than four months away from the start of the college football season, and (hopefully) a national championship run by the Notre Dame Fighting Irish. That seems like more than enough time to talk about Notre Dame’s 2026 schedule over and over and over again. Over the course of the offseason, I plan […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football and the battle against the label of OVERRATED
items.summary: When in doubt, call the triple option. POST SPRING RANKINGS ARE VERY MUCH IN FAVOR OF NOTRE DAME I’m not sure how many times I need to say it, but Notre Dame’s Blue-Gold game mattered very little to the grand scheme of things. “No duh,” you say? Well, yeah. It still amazes me that there […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: Irish get a pair of commitments from pass-catchers
items.summary: Notre Dame added two new pieces to its 2027 football recruiting class on Monday. 3-Star wide receiver, Jackson Coleman, and 3-Star tight end, Titus Hawk, gave their public commitments to Marcus Freeman and Notre Dame. Jackson Coleman has an interesting offer list and he chose the Irish over other notable programs like the Miami Hurricanes, […]

items.title: Notre Dame Lacrosse: Irish earn No. 2 seed in NCAA Tournament
items.summary: The Notre Dame Fighting Irish had a disappointing weekend. Notre Dame was ranked No 1. in the nation and the top seed in the ACC Tournament — but that came to a crashing halt with a 15-10 loss to the Virginia Cavaliers. The Hoos went on to win the ACC Tournament, which didn’t really hurt […]
